_comment: Key Colombian electoral dates that define anomaly analysis windows. Feature 'electoral_window' fires 1 when fecha_firma is within 90 days before any event_date. Feature 'ley_garantias_period' fires 1 for direct awards after restriction_start.

events.notes: Congreso (Senado + Cámara). Ley de Garantías restricts direct public contracts from 4 months before election day.
First round presidential election. Ley de Garantías restricts direct contracts from 4 months before.
Runoff (if no candidate achieves >50% in first round). Restriction window overlaps with first round.
Gobernadores, alcaldes, concejos, asambleas. Typical date is last Sunday of October.
